赌单双,计划表【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239061407_65901874<br>vk.com/topic-239183368_64967379<br>vk.com/topic-239205222_65065666<br>vk.com/topic-239183398_64967385<br>vk.com/topic-239066368_64967387<br>vk.com/topic-239205284_64460950<br>vk.com/topic-239149173_64627259<br>vk.com/topic-239183221_66116438<br>vk.com/topic-239183287_65901879<br>vk.com/topic-239153622_65065670<br>vk.com/topic-239100470_65522999<br>vk.com/topic-239058757_65901880<br>vk.com/topic-239183252_65065669<br>vk.com/topic-239149139_65246478<br>vk.com/topic-239183215_64372218<br>vk.com/topic-239079486_64780569<br>vk.com/topic-239149159_65246479<br>vk.com/topic-239153620_65523001<br>vk.com/topic-239183250_65523004<br>vk.com/topic-239058819_65246481<br>vk.com/topic-239183460_65523005<br>vk.com/topic-239148989_65246482<br>vk.com/topic-239183363_64627266<br>vk.com/topic-239183416_64780573<br>vk.com/topic-239142206_64780575<br>vk.com/topic-239183459_65246484<br>vk.com/topic-239079440_65523014<br>vk.com/topic-239137466_64780576<br>vk.com/topic-239183343_64627269<br>vk.com/topic-239142186_64780577<br>vk.com/topic-239183420_65523015<br>vk.com/topic-239100477_65901888<br>vk.com/topic-239061407_65901889<br>vk.com/topic
